title: ZXSpace Visual Walkthrough
description: Take a visual tour of ZXSpace and explore its city-defence gameplay, alien waves, power-ups, and progression.
summary: Explore ZXSpace through screenshots that showcase the gameplay, progression, and features that make every wave a new challenge.

images.caption: Prepare to defend your cities against invading aliens.
Retro-inspired arcade action with modern gameplay.
Every wave brings new challenges and greater rewards.

sections.heading: Take a Tour of ZXSpace
paragraphs: These screenshots introduce the main areas of ZXSpace, helping you become familiar with the game before or during play.
Follow the journey from defending your first city through increasingly difficult alien waves, powerful upgrades, and long-term progression.

featureShowcases.heading: Defend Your First City
featureShowcases.summary: Every game begins with a city depending on you to stop the alien invasion.
body: Your mission is to destroy every alien before they reach your cities. Quick reactions, accurate positioning, and smart use of your shields will help you survive the early waves.
Every successful defence prepares you for even greater challenges ahead.

featureShowcases.heading: Master the Battlefield
featureShowcases.summary: Learn how positioning, timing, and power-ups work together to keep your cities safe.
body: As the alien formations become faster and more dangerous, learning how to position your cannon and use your power-ups effectively becomes essential.
Strong defensive skills will help you survive longer and achieve higher scores.

image.caption: Every wave demands faster reactions and better positioning.

featureShowcases.heading: Every Wave Rewards Progress
featureShowcases.summary: Achievements, leaderboards, and BarkinMad Coins reward every successful defence.
body: Every completed wave helps you unlock achievements, earn BarkinMad Coins, and compete for higher scores on the Game Center leaderboards.
The longer you survive, the more rewarding every game becomes.

image.caption: Every completed wave brings you closer to your next goal.
